mapper.sql: select id, order_id, order_no, payment_no, channel, amount, status, platform_trade_no, pay_url, qrcode, request_payload, response_payload, paid_time, expire_time, created_time, updated_time, delete_flag from osh_payment
mapper.update: update osh_payment set platform_trade_no = #{platformTradeNo}, pay_url = #{payUrl}, qrcode = #{qrcode}, response_payload = #{responsePayload}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where payment_no = #{paymentNo}
update osh_payment set status = 1, platform_trade_no = #{platformTradeNo}, paid_time = #{paidTime}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where payment_no = #{paymentNo} and status = 0
update osh_payment set status = 2, response_payload = #{responsePayload}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where payment_no = #{paymentNo} and status = 0
update osh_payment set status = 3, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where payment_no = #{paymentNo} and status = 0
